name: Dutch Oven Venison
recipeIngredient: Flour seasoned with salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate meat overnight in whole milk. Discard marinade.
2. Pat roast dry.
3. Roll roast in seasoned flour and brown in hot cooking oil in Dutch oven until brown on all sides.
4. Remove the roast from the pot.
5. In the same pan, sauté onion, green pepper, and garlic over moderate heat for 5 minutes, stirring often.
6. Add tomatoes, sugar, wine, and thyme to the Dutch oven and heat.
7. Place parsley, cloves, peppercorns, bay leaves on a piece of double-thickness cheese cloth, and tie with a string into a bag.
8. Add the bag to pot.
9. When mixture is boiling, add browned roast and baste with sauce.
10. Cover and cook at 350 degrees F for about 2 1/2 hours, until tender.
11. Baste several times with pan juices during roasting.
12. Slice thinly and serve with pan juices.
